description_long: This bottle is crafted in the form of a stylized human figure, with a sculpted head and torso forming the upper section and a rounded, ribbed base. The upper torso is painted in a reddish-brown hue, while the head features detailed facial features and short, dark hair. The midsection is painted black and blue, resembling a draped garment, and the lower portion is tan with horizontal ridges and a large, painted face on the front. The bottle's surface shows areas of wear and discoloration, particularly on the lower section. The object appears to be made of ceramic or clay, giving it a matte, slightly rough finish.
description: A bottle shaped like a human figure with a sculpted head, painted torso, and ribbed, tan base featuring a large face. The surface is matte and shows signs of wear and discoloration.
description_view_0: Front view shows the sculpted head, painted torso, and the large face on the ribbed base clearly.
description_view_1: Side view highlights the profile of the head and torso, as well as the curvature and painted details of the base.
description_view_2: Rear view reveals the back of the head and torso, with the ribbed base and blue-black draped section visible.
description_view_3: Angled rear view shows the side of the head, the transition between the torso and base, and the ribbed texture.
attribute_damage_or_deformation: Visible discoloration and surface wear, especially on the lower section.
